symptoms.symptom_name: Exertional chest tightness with diaphoresis, relieved by rest
symptoms.character: Tight, heavy chest; sweaty and clammy

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Exertion-triggered chest tightness relieved by rest, with diaphoresis, is classic demand-led myocardial ischaemia.
New exertional chest pain mandates ECG and troponin to exclude ACS; cannot be excluded on history alone.
Concurrent coronary ischaemia supports a shared systemic vascular substrate with the erectile dysfunction.

symptoms.symptom_name: Reproducible exertional bilateral calf cramp relieved by rest (intermittent claudication)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Exercise-induced calf pain relieved by rest is the defining symptom of intermittent claudication.
Peripheral arterial disease confirms systemic atherosclerosis, the substrate for organic erectile dysfunction.

symptoms.symptom_name: Progressive erectile dysfunction over a year with absent nocturnal/morning erections

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Loss of spontaneous nocturnal/morning erections points to an organic vascular/neurogenic cause rather than psychogenic.
Psychogenic erectile dysfunction typically preserves nocturnal erections; their absence argues against it as the sole cause.

symptoms.symptom_name: Uncontrolled hypertension with antihypertensive stopped three months ago

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Uncontrolled hypertension is a major driver of endothelial dysfunction and atherosclerosis underlying vasculogenic erectile dysfunction and the cardiac/peripheral disease.
Metabolic syndrome compounds cardiovascular risk and is associated with organic erectile dysfunction.

symptoms.symptom_name: Diminished dorsalis pedis and posterior tibial pulses bilaterally

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Diminished distal pulses on palpation are objective evidence of peripheral arterial disease — a clinician examination finding, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Left carotid bruit and soft systolic murmur on auscultation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A carotid bruit indicates carotid atherosclerosis and elevated stroke risk — requires clinician auscultation, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: On-site 12-lead ECG (recorded normal by the attending clinician)

investigation_details.expected_result: Normal on-site tracing (source note) — but a single normal ECG does not exclude an acute coronary syndrome; serial ECG and troponin are required.
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Cardiac ischaemia unassessed; the AI Doctor cannot obtain an ECG and must escalate for one.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: ECG is first-line to assess for ischaemia/infarction; a normal ECG lowers but does not eliminate risk without troponin.

symptoms.symptom_name: Pharmacologically-stimulated penile Doppler ultrasound — diminished cavernosal peak systolic velocity

investigation_details.expected_result: Diminished peak systolic velocity in the cavernosal arteries, indicating severe arterial insufficiency.
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Confirms arteriogenic erectile dysfunction; a specialist investigation, never available in telehealth and not the acute priority.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reduced cavernosal peak systolic velocity on stimulated Doppler is the confirmatory test for arterial-insufficiency erectile dysfunction — sealed specialist investigation.
Objective clinician-measured hypertension; the AI Doctor has no verified device reading and infers uncontrolled BP from the patient-stated history of stopping medication, not a measured value.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: systemic atherosclerotic disease with vasculogenic erectile dysfunction
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Exertional angina, exertional claudication and organic erectile failure occurring together are three expressions of one systemic vascular disease and define the cardiovascular-risk emergency.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: New exertional chest pain of possible cardiac origin must be assessed with ECG and troponin; the AI Doctor cannot obtain these and must escalate for them urgently.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Fasting lipids, HbA1c/glucose, renal function, cardiovascular risk stratification
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Quantifies and treats the modifiable atherosclerotic risk factors driving all three ischaemic manifestations.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Ankle-brachial index / arterial duplex for peripheral arterial disease
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms and grades the peripheral arterial disease suggested by claudication and diminished pulses.
Specialist confirmation of arteriogenic erectile dysfunction — deferred until after cardiac stabilisation; not the acute priority.
Prescribing a PDE5 inhibitor before cardiac assessment is unsafe (unassessed cardiac fitness, nitrate contraindication) and is not an appropriate telehealth action.
